chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 578 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 10.04.2025. None appeared for petitioner, no intimation received. On 06.03.2025 following order was passed. “ None present nor intimation received. The petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution. However, in the interest of justice the petition is adjourned to 10.04.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the learned counsel for the petitioner.” Thereafter no efforts have been taken by the petitioner or his counsel to proceed with the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
